title: LessTotem
description: Removes the totem that appears on your screen when you pop a totem and replaces it with a red vignette effect so you still are visually aware of the totem pop but you can still see clearly.
body:
it injects code into the method that renders the totem and stops it from happening.

Removes the totem that appears on your screen when you pop a totem and replaces it with a red vignette effect so you still are visually aware of the totem pop but you can still see clearly. The red vignette starts mostly opaque and fades in like a second or two.
